extension_description.message: Best Video Downloader Extension. Downloads most popular media types from any website.

popup_msg_customize_screen_1.message: By selecting the 'Agree' option, you consent to the sharing of your browsing data in a manner that is aggregated and anonymized. This anonymized data will not be shared with any 3rd parties and is used solely to enhance our services.

popup_msg_disclaimer_1.message: To enable us to provide you with our video downloading services, we collect anonymous data including URLs and browsing history.

popup_msg_disclaimer_2.message: With your consent, we may collect data on the websites you visit in an anonymous manner. This information is solely used to provide you with our services and will not be shared with any third parties.

popup_msg_disclaimer_3.message: This data won't be shared with any 3rd parties and is used solely to enhance our services.

popup_msg_disclaimer_4.message: This data won't be shared with any 3rd parties and is used solely to enhance our services.

popup_msg_disclaimer_5.message: We want to emphasize that we do not seek to obtain your identity, preferences, or any personally identifiable information from you. This commitment is outlined with more details in our

popup_msg_disclaimer_title.message: Want to use Video Downloader PLUS?

popup_msg_no_download_1.message: You need to wait until video completely preloads, then start to download.

popup_msg_no_download_2.message: Otherwise, you will download only pre-loaded part.

popup_msg_nomedia_detected.message: To get started, try playing the video first. If that doesn't work, reload the page. If a video is still not detected, please contact us for additional help.

popup_msg_unsupported_platform_1.message: Due to YouTube Policy. It isn't allowed to download from YouTube.

popup_msg_unsupported_platform_2.message: Please, do not post negative reviews. This is not our fault.

popup_msg_unsupported_platform_4.message: This video platform is not supported. We apologize for any inconvenience this may cause.

popup_msg_unsupported_platform_5.message: Please try a different video platform. Thank you for your understanding
